visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is applicable for exceptional and well-founded circumstances, namely for programs of study in a certified institution, Student exchange, unpaid professional internship, volunteer work or pursuant to WTO obligations or those arising from conventions and international agreements to which Portugal is a state party.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is applicable for exceptional and well-founded circumstances, namely for programs of study in a certified institution, Student exchange, unpaid professional internship, volunteer work or pursuant to WTO obligations or those arising from conventions and international agreements to which Portugal is a state party. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:E6 - Student Exchange/ Unpaid Professional Internship/ Volunteer Work]
- Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Bali

## Documents Required
Required documents:
Please find below a list of the documents required for all applicants travelling for exceptional and well-founded circumstances, namely for programs of study in a certified institution, Student exchange, unpaid professional internship, volunteer work or pursuant to WTO obligations or those arising from conventions and international agreements to which Portugal is a state party.
Document Checklist
Declaraçao sef consulta registos criminais

## Photo Specifications
The photograph must be:
- Colored
- With white background
- With size 3,5 x 4,5 cm

## Processing Time
General processing time is 30-60 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Form can be downloaded from here.

Visa Application Form in English
Visa Application Form in Portuguese
Visa Application Form in French
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel, and seeking to enter Portugal solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Portugal to join a vessel in this country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants for a seaman’s visa must be employed in any capacity on board a vessel, and seeking to enter Portugal solely in pursuit of his/her calling as a seaman, with the intention of departing with the vessel or reshipping on other vessel that is bound for a foreign port or place or one coming to the Portugal to join a vessel in this country.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Transit Visa (Seamen)]
Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Bali

visa_types.name: D – Residency Job Seeker Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Required documents:
If you are a third-country citizen and intend to enter and stay in Portugal to look for a job, you must express interest in enrolling in the Institute of Employment and Vocational Training (IEFP), the Portuguese Public Employment Service, before submitting your Job Search Visa application.
To make the expression of interest declaration for registration with the IEFP, you must fill in the following form: 
https://formularios.iefp.pt/index.php/929227?lang=en (https://formularios.iefp.pt/index.php/929227?lang=en)
Please find below a list of the documents required for Job Seeker Visa.
Document Checklist
visa_types.visa_fees:

- Mode of Payment: Cash/Credit/Debit/QRIS for Jakarta and Bali

visa_types.forms: Form can be downloaded from here.

Required documents:
If you are a third-country citizen and intend to enter and stay in Portugal to look for a job, you must express interest in enrolling in the Institute of Employment and Vocational Training (IEFP), the Portuguese Public Employment Service, before submitting your Job Search Visa application.
To make the expression of interest declaration for registration with the IEFP, you must fill in the following form:

visa_types.name: Medium Term Visa
visa_types.overview:
Medium Term Visas are national Visas which are processed in accordance with the national legislation of the respective Member state. All the visa applications under this category are processed by the Embassy and sent to SEF, the Portuguese Boarder and Foreigners Service, for their analysis.
Residence: For stay longer than 3 months.
The process time for Temporary Stay Visa or Residence Visa is usually 30 – 60 days, after interview at Embassy, if required.
For Temporary Stay Visa sponsored by Portuguese, please provide need original document of “Term of Responsibility”, authenticated by DEF Officer or Notary.
visa_types.full_text:
Medium Term Visas are national Visas which are processed in accordance with the national legislation of the respective Member state. All the visa applications under this category are processed by the Embassy and sent to SEF, the Portuguese Boarder and Foreigners Service, for their analysis.
Residence: For stay longer than 3 months.
The process time for Temporary Stay Visa or Residence Visa is usually 30 – 60 days, after interview at Embassy, if required.
For Temporary Stay Visa sponsored by Portuguese, please provide need original document of “Term of Responsibility”, authenticated by DEF Officer or Notary.
